answer: The 1M token context window is now generally available for Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 at standard pricing, and requests over 200k tokens work automatically for these models with no beta header required. If a user attempts to use the 1M token context window with Claude Sonnet 4.5 after April 30, 2026, the context-1m-2025-08-07 beta header will have no effect, and requests that exceed the standard 200k-token context window will return an error.
US-only inference is available at 1.1x pricing for models released after February 1, 2026.
All requests to the Claude Haiku 3 model will now return an error. Anthropic recommends migrating to Claude Haiku 4.5.
